description: Add in-app preview for ALL email attachment types. Images show inline, PDFs in iframe, Office/text files via Google Docs Viewer in a modal. The Eye button must appear on every attachment, not just images/PDFs. Both email-detail.tsx and conversation-thread.tsx are affected.

userStories.title: Create shared AttachmentPreviewModal component
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I want a modal that can preview any attachment type in-app, so I don't have to download files to see their content.
acceptanceCriteria: Modal uses existing UnifiedModal (size full) for consistency with DocumentViewerModal
Images: displayed via with zoom/fit controls
PDFs: displayed via iframe with signedUrl
Office files (docx, xlsx, pptx): displayed via Google Docs Viewer iframe (docs.google.com/gview?url=encodedSignedUrl&embedded=true)
Text/CSV files: displayed via Google Docs Viewer iframe (same pattern)
Unknown types: fallback message with download button
Modal header shows filename + file size + download button
Loading state with Loader2 spinner while fetching signed URL
Error state with retry + download fallback
Lint passes (npm run lint)
userStories.notes: Created attachment-preview-modal.tsx. UnifiedModal full size, 3 preview modes: image (), PDF (iframe), Google Docs Viewer (iframe for docx/xlsx/pptx/csv/txt/rtf). Two-phase loading (API fetch + content render). Error state with retry. Download via badge prop in header. Extension-based fallback for generic mime types.

userStories.title: Wire preview modal in email-detail.tsx
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire viewing a single email, I want the Eye button on ALL attachments (not just images/PDFs), so I can preview any file in-app.
acceptanceCriteria: Eye button visible on ALL attachments regardless of mime_type
Clicking Eye opens AttachmentPreviewModal with correct attachment data
Existing inline image preview still works (for images, modal is an alternative via Eye button)
Existing PDF new-tab behavior replaced by in-modal iframe preview
Download button remains unchanged
Lint passes (npm run lint)
userStories.notes: Replaced old handlePreviewAttachment (inline image + PDF new-tab) with modal-based preview. Removed isPreviewableImage/isPreviewablePdf guards — Eye button now on ALL attachments. Removed previewingAttachmentId and imagePreviewUrls state. Added AttachmentPreviewModal import + render. Modal handles its own loading/error/signed URL fetch.

userStories.title: Wire preview modal in conversation-thread.tsx
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire viewing an email thread, I want the same preview behavior as single-email view.
acceptanceCriteria: Eye button visible on ALL attachments in thread messages
Clicking Eye opens AttachmentPreviewModal
Each thread message manages its own preview state independently
Lint passes (npm run lint)
userStories.notes: Full rewrite: removed isPreviewableImage/isPreviewablePdf/imagePreviewUrls/handlePreviewAttachment. Replaced with previewAttachment state + AttachmentPreviewModal rendered per EmailThreadItem. Eye button on ALL attachments. Removed unused useCallback import dependency on old preview handlers.
